summary: Profile Cover Animation + Advanced Profile Cosmetics
changes: Added _PROFILE_GEOMETRY_SHAPES constant (circle, squircle, rounded, hexagon, diamond)
Added _applyProfileDecorations(imgEl, uid) function — applies geometry, outline, and glow to avatar img elements
Wired _applyProfileDecorations into createMessageElement after ring wrap assembly
Wired _applyProfileDecorations propagation in _propagateAppearanceChange after bubble loop
All outline thickness values pass through clampThickness(0–4)
Idempotent — resets all profile styles before re-applying
